name: bolt-industrial-engineering-services
description: Bolt Industrial Engineering Services - One page engineering site

scripts.build: npm run sass && npm run copy
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx concurrently "npm run sass:watch" "node server.js"
scripts.debug-build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); console.log('CWD:', process.cwd()); console.log('src/sass exists:', fs.existsSync('src/sass')); console.log('main.scss exists:', fs.existsSync('src/sass/main.scss')); console.log('sass binary exists:', fs.existsSync('node_modules/.bin/sass')); console.log('root files:', fs.readdirSync('.').join(', '));"
